body:
terraswallows:

Anyone else have that moment of “I must get a nose ring.” When they transition?

Yes. And it’s on the list, but I know they are going to make me take it out for surgeries and I don’t want it to heal up, so am waiting until after. 😞

The surgeon who did my nose even said he’d mark the areas it was ok to pierce when I wanted it done. (There’s apparently a whole cartilage scaffolding in my nose now! 😮)

trail.content_raw: Anyone else have that moment of “I must get a nose ring.” When they transition?
